raw_consumer_statement: Regarding my previous case ID XXXX complaint with Citi Bank XXXX which I submitted to CFPB with case ID XXXX, I received a response from Citi Bank stating that my case was resolved in my favor and a credit of {$610.00} was issued. However, I only received {$250.00} in reality. Despite engaging in discussions with Citi Bank for over three months, they have refused to pay me the outstanding amount. I will also attach a screenshot of the dispute resolution and the final letter I received from Citi Bank.
